paper.title: Hydration properties of basic oxygen furnace steel slag
paper.material_system: Basic oxygen furnace steel slag paste
paper.notes: Reports hydration heat, non-evaporable water, XRD and SEM of steel slag pastes; no compressive-strength results are supplied.

evidence.evidence_text: Title and abstract identify hydration properties of basic oxygen furnace steel slag; methods describe hydration heat, non-evaporable water, XRD and SEM.

main_risks: No directly extractable cementitious mix-level compressive-strength data in supplied packet.
